schema_note: Completion signal for EXP-255 — Overview rework Item 1 (hero swap). Per HNOTE-OPERATOR-DESIGN-REVIEW-V2-OVERVIEW-REWORK-001: route through curmudgeon for adversarial review; do NOT auto-integrate.
scope_item: Item 1 of 5 — HERO SWAP (highest priority within HNOTE)
summary: EXP-255 replaces the Overview tab's four-up scorecard sc-hero with a display-scale thesis sentence ("None of the ${counts.total} predictions produces a dome-specific result that standard physics cannot already explain.") followed by a compact letterspaced stat row that preserves all four original figures and their links. The verdict bar chart relocates from above the old four-up to below the new thesis-stat-row, keeping the existing EXP-209 visual on the Overview but yielding the first-visible-content slot to the thesis. Build-template-only change in build-scripts/generate-html.js (HTML block + CSS additions); no data files modified.

hero_swap_verification.thesis_sentence_at_display_scale: Yes — clamp(2.0rem, 5vw, 3.4rem) renders ~3.4rem (54.4 CSS px) on 1440px viewport, larger than .title-block h1 at 2.4rem.
hero_swap_verification.thesis_sentence_text_matches_operator_au: Yes — exact wording from HNOTE Item 1 with literal "69" templated to ${counts.total} per project rule. counts.total resolves to 69 for ECM V51.1 (verified 2026-04-26 against live https://john09289.github.io/predictions).
hero_swap_verification.stats_demoted_to_body_row: Yes — thesis-stat-num at 1.45rem (vs original 2.8rem), thesis-stat-cap at 0.74rem letterspaced uppercase. Single row beneath thesis.
hero_swap_verification.composition_above_the_fold_1440x900: Confirmed via spec arithmetic — title-block ~14rem + thesis-hero ~13.5rem ≈ 27.5rem ≈ 440 CSS px, well under 900px viewport even after subtracting tab-bar ~70px and browser chrome ~100px. Playwright verification deferred to integration QA.
hero_swap_verification.all_four_stat_figures_preserved: Yes — counts.total, 0, dome_claimed_failures + silentFailures, "Wrong side" all retained.
hero_swap_verification.all_four_links_preserved: Two links to preserve: failures → #p3-failures (wins tab) and Wrong-Side → #timestamp-error (timestamp tab). Both kept on the new thesis-stat-cap anchors.

round2_recommendation_2_verdict_bar_audi.note: EXP-255 only relocates the verdict bar; does NOT pre-resolve the audit.

load_bearing_content_audit_summary: Walked all four sc-cards. No load-bearing content lost: every number, link, and primary phrase preserved. Editorial sub-labels removed from hero are restated in (a) the new thesis-claim itself (sc-card #2 zero-actual-wins kernel), (b) accuracy-math-section directly below (sc-card #1 zero-falsifications), or (c) Latest Findings on the same Overview tab + the dedicated Timestamp Error tab (sc-card #4 April 2026 update). Full audit table in EXP-255 file.
curmudgeon_mission_per_hnote: Verify hero swap doesn't lose load-bearing content from old four-up (covered by EXP-255 load_bearing_content_audit table)
Verify visual hierarchy: thesis is hero, support is body, no competing elements
Stress-test operator decision to remove four-up tiles from hero (the dashboard pitch was deliberate per round-1 brief; did round-2 review's improvement justify the swap?)

prerequisites_satisfied.EXP_211_integrated: Yes (2026-04-25T17:27:34Z). accuracy-math-section in place at expected position.
prerequisites_satisfied.EXP_209_verdict_bar_present: Yes — generateVerdictBarChart on line 1366 of build-scripts/generate-html.js.
prerequisites_satisfied.standalone: EXP-255 has no blocking dependencies on Items 2-5, EXP-190, EXP-253, or EXP-254.

out_of_scope: Items 2-5 of HNOTE-OPERATOR-DESIGN-REVIEW-V2-OVERVIEW-REWORK-001 (verdict-bar audit, falsification module, How-to-Evaluate preface, eclipse badge)
Modifying any data file (data/wins.json, data/sections.json, data/uncounted-failures.json)
test_coverage_note: Existing test.js covers data-file integrity. Build-step (node build.js html) catches template syntax errors. Recommend adding Playwright reachability tests post-integration for AC5 (above-fold at 1440x900) and AC6 (mobile collapse at 390x844), deferred from this EXP per the EXP-211-redesign-v2 precedent.
json_validation_passed: Yes — node -e "JSON.parse(...)" returns valid for both EXP-255 file and human-notes.json (clone + workspace) and expansion-tracker.json after updates.
